arts.ttl: Why Emi Martinez was taken off at half-time as Unai Emery provides injury update
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has confirmed Emi Martinez was taken off in the 4-1 defeat at Crystal Palace because he was feeling some pain. Emi Martinez came off at half-time in Aston Villa's defeat at Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: ‘A nice moment’: Nketiah delighted with first league goal for Palace
arts.sum: Eddie Nketiah was delighted to cap Crystal Palace’s dominant display against Aston Villa with his first Premier League goal for the club.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace face Marc Guehi injury concern after Aston Villa rout
arts.sum: The England defender played the full 90 minutes but manager Oliver Glasner revealed he ‘felt pain in his knee’.

arts.ttl: Glasner praises Palace's 'great performance' and 'fantastic goals'
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner praises his side's "great performance" following their 4-1 win over Aston Villa which included two goals from Ismaila Sarr.

arts.ttl: Emery 'disappointed' but Villa must remain motivated
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery says he is "disappointed" by the 4-1 defeat at Crystal Palace, and that they must stay motivated for their upcoming FA Cup and Champions League fixtures.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace 4-1 Aston Villa: Ismaila Sarr proves his value as Oliver Glasner reacts to momentous win
arts.sum: Palace end their long wait for a Premier League home win

arts.ttl: Birthday boy Ismaila Sarr stars as Crystal Palace hammer Aston Villa
arts.sum: Jean-Philippe Mateta and Eddie Nketiah added to Sarr’s double in a 4-1 win.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace 4-1 Aston Villa: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Ismaila Sarr bags a birthday brace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace secure a fantastic 4-1 win over Aston Villa in the Premier League on Tuesday, as Ismaila Sarr celebrates his 27th birthday with a brilliant brace.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans are all saying the same thing about Adam Wharton after his heroics for Crystal Palace against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Arsenal are likely to be busy in the summer transfer window as they look to strengthen their ranks in pursuit of silverware. Although the Gunners...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa suffer fresh blow in Crystal Palace clash as Emi Martinez replaced
arts.sum: Emi Martinez was replaced by Robin Olsen at half-time in Aston Villa's Premier League match against Crystal Palace The goalkeeper was replaced at half-time by Robin Olsen, who is making only his second league appearance of the campaign.
